info.title: ignixa-validator
info.description: CLI tool for validating FHIR resources using the Ignixa.Validation library. Supports file input, JSON string input, and formatted console output.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: FHIR Validation - Validate FHIR resources against specifications

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --input
options.description: Path to JSON file to validate

options.name: --json
options.description: JSON string to validate

options.name: --out
options.description: Output file for validation results (OperationOutcome JSON)

options.name: --console
options.description: Display formatted validation results in console [default: False]
